Last 30d: 29k ad impr (73% of 39.8k), 387 ad clicks, 506 ad page visits (60% of 842), 120 ad leads (63% of 189) -- ad-lead metrics down vs Mon Jul 6 scrape (32.4k impr / 424 clicks / 532 visits / 135 leads) as the 30d window shifts.
